steps.t: Drugât is located somewhere in the caverns of Nimrond. You should find and confront Drugât.
Drugât is located somewhere in the caverns of Nimrond. You should speak with Drugât.
Treasures of the Second Age can be found in Western Gondor and the Paths of the Dead. You should seek out the five treasures of the Second Age.
Drugât is located in the caverns of Nimrond. You should return the Second Age treasures to Drugât.
